name: marketing-skills
description: 营销技能市场包：用于消费者洞察、产品概念、产品买点文案、江小白级情绪短文案、节气营销海报、活动简报、内容规划和上市推广工作流。Marketing skills market package for consumer insight, product concepts, product benefit copywriting, Jiangxiaobai-style emotional copywriting, seasonal posters, campaign briefs, content planning, and go-to-market workflows.
